equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

title: 2025-12-15 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 5.62
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-12-15: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 5.62/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-12-15, the score printed 5.62/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
